channel.title: CompTIA Certification on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in CompTIA Certification on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Hardware and Network Troubleshooting
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Troubleshooting" , "Hardware Diagnostics" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Diagnostics" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master hardware and network troubleshooting for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Diagnose motherboards, RAM, CPUs, power, drives, displays, mobile devices, printers, and networks.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Hardware Components
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Computer Hardware" , "Motherboards" , "CPU" , "Storage" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "PC Building"
item.description: Master hardware for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn cables and connectors, RAM, storage devices, motherboards and CPUs, power supplies, and printers.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Mobile Devices
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Mobile Devices" , "Laptops" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Smartphones" , "Tablets" , "Computer Hardware"
item.description: Master mobile devices for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn laptop hardware, accessories and connectivity, network connectivity, MDM, and mobile synchronization.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Networking Fundamentals
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Networking" , "TCP/IP" , "Wireless Networking" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Network Hardware" , "SOHO Networks" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master networking for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn TCP and UDP ports, wireless technologies, networked host services, network hardware, SOHO configuration, and tools.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Virtualization and Cloud Computing
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Virtualization" , "Cloud Computing" , "Hypervisors" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Containers" , "VDI" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master virtualization and cloud computing for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn virtual machines, hypervisors, VDI, containers, cloud models, and cloud characteristics.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operating Systems
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operating Systems" , "Windows Administration" , "Linux" , "macOS" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Command Line" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operating systems for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn OS types, installations, Windows editions, tools, command line, settings, networking, macOS, and Linux.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operational Procedures
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operational Procedures" , "Documentation" , "Change Management" , "Backups" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Professionalism" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operational procedures for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn documentation, change management, backups, safety, environmental controls, communication, scripting, and AI basics.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Security
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Security" , "Malware" , "Wireless Security" , "Windows Security" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Social Engineering" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn physical and logical security, Windows security settings, wireless protocols, malware, social engineering, and hardening.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Software Troubleshooting
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Software Troubleshooting" , "Malware Removal" , "Windows" , "Mobile OS" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Diagnostics" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master software troubleshooting for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Diagnose Windows OS issues, mobile OS and application problems, security symptoms, and malware removal.

item.title: CompTIA A+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the 220-1201 and 220-1202 Exams
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "IT Certification" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "Operating Systems" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "IT Support" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Windows Administration"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA A+ study course covering all exam objectives for the 220-1201 Core 1 and 220-1202 Core 2 exams. Learn hardware, networking, operating systems, security, and troubleshooting.

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CS0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Security Operations" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Incident Response" , "CompTIA Certification" , "SIEM" , "Threat Intelligence" , "Threat Hunting" , "Security Analysis"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003) study course covering security operations, vulnerability management, incident response, and reporting for cybersecurity analysts.

item.title: CompTIA Linux+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the XK0-005 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Linux+ Course" , "Linux Certification" , "System Administration" , "Linux Security" , "Shell Scripting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "DevOps" , "Container Technologies" , "Linux Troubleshooting" , "Open Source"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Linux+ (XK0-005) study course covering system management, security, scripting and automation, containers, and troubleshooting for Linux environments.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the PT0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Red Team" , "Exploitation" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) study course covering engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation and lateral movement.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CY0-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "CY0-001 Certification" , "AI Security" , "Machine Learning Security" , "LLM Security" , "AI Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "Responsible AI"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study course covering basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance for cybersecurity practitioners.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): General Security Concepts
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Cryptography" , "PKI" , "Zero Trust" , "Access Control" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Controls" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master general security concepts for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn security controls, the CIA triad, change management, cryptography, PKI, and Zero Trust.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Cloud Security" , "Data Protection" , "Resilience" , "Network Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn architecture models, infrastructure security, data protection, and resilience and recovery.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Operations" , "Incident Response" , "Identity Management" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Automation" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "SIEM" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security operations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn secure baselines, asset management, vulnerability management, monitoring, IAM, automation, and incident response.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Threats, Vulnerabilities, and Mitigations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Threat Analysis" , "Vulnerabilities" , "Malware" , "Social Engineering" , "Attack Vectors" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Mitigation" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn threat actors, attack vectors, vulnerability types, malicious indicators, and mitigation techniques.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SY0-701 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Threat Analysis" , "Security Architecture" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Risk Management" , "Incident Response" , "Security Operations"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701) study course covering all five exam domains: general security concepts, threats and vulnerabilities, security architecture, security operations, and security program management.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX Course: Complete Study Guide for the CAS-005 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "CASP+ Certification" , "Security Architecture" , "Security Engineering" , "Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Enterprise Security" , "Advanced Security" , "Cryptography" , "Threat Hunting"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005, formerly CASP+) study course covering governance risk and compliance, security architecture, security engineering, and security operations for advanced security practitioners.
